items.headline: Pope Leo XIV arrives in Cameroon on second leg of African tour
items.summary: After two days in Algeria marred by two suicide attacks and a spat with US President Donald Trump, the pontiff's plane landed in the Cameroonian capital Yaounde shortly before 3:00 pm local time (1400 GMT), an AFP journalist travelling on the papal plane said.

items.headline: RIVEO Appoints New Chief Executive Officer Backed by Over 20 Years Global Experience
items.summary: RIVEO Limited has announced the appointment of Gregory Coquet as its new Chief Executive Officer, effective from 1 October 2026. The appointment, which forms part of the group’s formal succession plan, will see Mr Coquet succeed François Eynaud. items.headline: Togo to ask UN members to adopt world maps that show true size of Africa
items.summary: Togo has launched a campaign to adopt a world map that better represents the true size of Africa. Now Togo will ask UN member states to commit to ditching European centred maps in favour of more accurate representations.

items.headline: Chinese national sentenced to a year in prison for attempting to smuggle ants out of Kenya
items.summary: A Chinese national has been sentenced to a year in prison for attempting to smuggle ants out of Kenya. Zhang Kequn was arrested at Nairobi airport last month with more than 2,000 ants hidden in his luggage.

items.headline: Brazil calls for stronger defence preparedness as LAAD expo opens in São Paulo
items.summary: As geopolitical tensions evolve globally, authorities say initiatives like LAAD Security reflect a growing push across the region to balance peace with preparedness.

items.headline: Russia repeats offer to take Iran's enriched uranium
items.summary: As the world waits for peace talks between the US and Iran to resume, Russia says it can help solve the problem of Iran's enriched uranium.

items.headline: Maurice engage des discussions avec Washington pour sécuriser ses exportations
items.summary: Maurice prépare l’après-AGOA. Des discussions bilatérales ont été engagées par Port-Louis avec Washington afin de sécuri

items.headline: Belle-Rive : un terrain identifié pour la construction d’un hôpital vétérinaire
items.summary: Trois lots de terrain, totalisant neuf arpents, ont été identifiés à Belle-Rive pour la mise en place d’un hôpital vétér
